title: Lab 35: Process Priority and Tuned
description: Tune the system with the requested profile and adjust process scheduling priority

tasks: Install the tuned package if it is not already present and activate the tuned profile throughput-performance on clientvm.
Start the command sleep 3600 in the background and save its PID in /root/sleep35.pid.
Adjust the nice value of that process so it becomes 5.
hints: Use ps to verify the final nice value of the target process.
task_titles: Install the tuned package if it is not already...
